build.buildCommand: sh -lc "if [ '${RUN_FB_MESSENGER_BRIDGE:-false}' = 'true' ]; then python -m playwright install --with-deps chromium; fi"

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc "if [ '${RUN_FB_MESSENGER_BRIDGE:-false}' = 'true' ]; then PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python fb_messenger_bridge.py; else python kg2bot.py; fi"
